title: Command Cockpit Mission Console
summary: Reshaped the default Command Cockpit Quest module into a compact mission console by removing duplicate module chrome, collapsing pre-module rails, arranging current run, signals, next move, gate, and quick commands into a two-column control surface, and restoring a single-column Command Cockpit shell on narrow screens.
proof: Added a Command Cockpit-only marker and README unlock entry.
Scoped overview Quest CSS to hide the duplicate lane-button-top, pre-module floor rails, and event chain only inside the bounded cockpit.
Mapped hero, signals, command cards, and quick actions into explicit console grid areas.
Recorded a regression test for the compact mission console behavior.
Added a scoped responsive override so the Command Cockpit workspace, lane list, and detail panel stop holding the desktop two-column shell below the tablet breakpoint.
